ddls:
CREATE TABLE "charges" (
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge */,
  "charge_code" TEXT /* Code for the charge (e.g., 11377(A) HS M (35353)) */,
  "charge_description" TEXT /* Description of the charge (e.g., POSSESS CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE) */,
  "charge_type" TEXT /* Type of charge (e.g., Felony, Misdemeanor) */,
  "charge_degree" TEXT /* Degree of charge (e.g., First Degree, Second Degree) */,
  "statute" TEXT /* Statute number for the charge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charge associated with the case */,
  "bail_amount" REAL /* Bail amount for the case */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the case (e.g., Misdemeanor) */,
  "court_case_number" TEXT /* Court case number for the case */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* ID of the court associated with the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_charge_id FOREIGN KEY ("charge_id") REFERENCES charges ("charge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inmates" (
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inmate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the inmate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the inmate */,
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charge associated with the inmate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the inmate */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the inmate */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the inmate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inmate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inmates_charge_id FOREIGN KEY ("charge_id") REFERENCES charges ("charge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courts" (
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the court */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the court */,
  "court_type" TEXT /* Type of court (e.g., Superior Court, Municipal Court) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "law_enforcement_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of agency (e.g., Police Department, Sheriff's Department) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case status */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case associated with the status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., Pending, Closed) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_status_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casehearings" (
  "hearing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case hearing */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case associated with the hearing */,
  "hearing_date" TEXT /* Date of the hearing */,
  "hearing_time" TEXT /* Time of the hearing */,
  "hearing_type" TEXT /* Type of hearing (e.g., Preliminary Hearing, Trial) */,
  "hearing_result" TEXT /* Result of the hearing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hearing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casehearings_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentencings" (
  "sentencing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentencing */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case associated with the sentencing */,
  "sentence" TEXT /* Sentence given (e.g., Probation, Jail Time) */,
  "sentence_date" TEXT /* Date the sentence was given */,
  "sentence_description" TEXT /* Description of the sentence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentencing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentencings_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inmate_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inmate status */,
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inmate associated with the status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inmate (e.g., Incarcerated, Released) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inmate_status_inmate_id FOREIGN KEY ("inmate_id") REFERENCES inmates ("inmate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incarcerations" (
  "incarceration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incarceration */,
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inmate associated with the incarceration */,
  "incarceration_date" TEXT /* Date the inmate was incarcerated */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the inmate was released */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility where the inmate was incarcerated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incarceration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incarcerations_inmate_id FOREIGN KEY ("inmate_id") REFERENCES inmates ("inmate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "probations" (
  "probation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each probation */,
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inmate associated with the probation */,
  "probation_date" TEXT /* Date the probation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the probation ends */,
  "probation_officer" TEXT /* Name of the probation officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("probation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_probations_inmate_id FOREIGN KEY ("inmate_id") REFERENCES inmates ("inmate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paroles" (
  "parole_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parole */,
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inmate associated with the parole */,
  "parole_date" TEXT /* Date the parole started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the parole ends */,
  "parole_officer" TEXT /* Name of the parole officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parole_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paroles_inmate_id FOREIGN KEY ("inmate_id") REFERENCES inmates ("inmate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency the officer belongs to */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officers_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES law_enforcement_agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arrests" (
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arrest */,
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inmate associated with the arrest */,
  "arrest_date" TEXT /* Date of the arrest */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who made the arrest */,
  "arrest_location" TEXT /* Location of the arrest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arrest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_inmate_id FOREIGN KEY ("inmate_id") REFERENCES inmates ("inmate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "court_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the court officer */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* ID of the court the officer belongs to */,
  "court_role" TEXT /* Role of the officer in the court */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_officers_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES courts ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hearings_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hearing officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hearing officer */,
  "hearing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hearing the officer is associated with */,
  "hearing_role" TEXT /* Role of the officer in the hearing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hearings_officers_hearing_id FOREIGN KEY ("hearing_id") REFERENCES casehearings ("hearing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentencing_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentencing officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sentencing officer */,
  "sentencing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentencing the officer is associated with */,
  "sentencing_role" TEXT /* Role of the officer in the sentencing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentencing_officers_sentencing_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentencing_id") REFERENCES sentencings ("sentencing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bail_bonds" (
  "bond_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bail bond */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case associated with the bond */,
  "bond_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bond */,
  "bond_type" TEXT /* Type of bond (e.g., Cash, Surety) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bond_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bail_bonds_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case associated with the expense */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date the expense was incurred */,
  "expense_amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "expense_type" TEXT /* Type of expense (e.g., Court Costs, Attorney Fees) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., Cash, Check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case associated with the fee */,
  "fee_date" TEXT /* Date the fee was incurred */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., Filing Fee, Service Fee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case associated with the violation */,
  "violation_date" TEXT /* Date the violation occurred */,
  "violation_type" TEXT /* Type of violation (e.g., Probation Violation, Parole Violation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warrants" (
  "warrant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warrant */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case associated with the warrant */,
  "warrant_date" TEXT /* Date the warrant was issued */,
  "warrant_type" TEXT /* Type of warrant (e.g., Arrest Warrant, Bench Warrant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warrant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warrants_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appeals" (
  "appeal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appeal */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case associated with the appeal */,
  "appeal_date" TEXT /* Date the appeal was filed */,
  "appeal_type" TEXT /* Type of appeal (e.g., Direct Appeal, Post-Conviction Relief) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appeal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appeals_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)
